testcase.name: test_add_movement
testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.unit def test_add_movement(): with get_session() as session: data = { "role": "Salesman", "dept": "Sales", "name": "Joe Doe", "email": "joe@doe.com", } joe, created = add_person(session, Person(**data)) assert created is True
data = { "role": "Manager", "dept": "Management", "name": "Jim Doe", "email": "jim@doe.com", } jim, created = add_person(session, Person(**data)) assert created is True
session.commit()
> add(-30, email="joe@doe.com")
/Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/rochacbruno@dundie-rewards__e35d6be5__httpx__aiohttp/tests/test_add.py:51: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ /Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/rochacbruno@dundie-rewards__e35d6be5__httpx__aiohttp/dundie/utils/auth.py:43: in decorator return f(*args, from_person=person, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/rochacbruno@dundie-rewards__e35d6be5__httpx__aiohttp/dundie/core.py:93: in add people = read(**query) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
query = {'email': 'joe@doe.com'}, return_data = [] query_statements = [<sqlalchemy.sql.elements.BinaryExpression object at 0x1060a4bd0>] sql = <sqlmodel.sql.expression.SelectOfScalar object at 0x107295210> session = <sqlmodel.orm.session.Session object at 0x1072e1d10> currencies = <sqlalchemy.engine.result.ScalarResult object at 0x1072cdb50> rates = <coroutine object get_rates at 0x1075ff220> results = <sqlalchemy.engine.result.ScalarResult object at 0x1077e92d0>
def read(**query: Query) -> ResultDict: """Read data from db and filters using query
read(email="joe@doe.com") """ query = {k: v for k, v in query.items() if v is not None} return_data = []
query_statements = [] if "dept" in query: query_statements.append(Person.dept == query["dept"]) if "email" in query: query_statements.append(Person.email == query["email"]) sql = select(Person) # SELECT FROM PERSON if query_statements: sql = sql.where(*query_statements) # WHERE ...
with get_session() as session: currencies = session.exec( select(Person.currency).distinct(Person.currency) ) rates = get_rates(currencies) results = session.exec(sql) for person in results: > total = rates[person.currency].value * person.balance[0].value ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'coroutine' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_load_positive_call_load_command

failure.message:
assert 'Dunder Mifflin Associates' in " 
 Usage: load [OPTIONS] FILEPATH 
 
 Try 'load --help' for help 
╭─ Error ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Got unexpected extra arguments (2026/Software │
│ Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/rochacbruno@dundie-rewards__e35d6be5__htt │
│ px__aiohttp/integration/../tests/assets/people.csv) │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
 
" + where " 
 Usage: load [OPTIONS] FILEPATH 
 
 Try 'load --help' for help 
╭─ Error ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Got unexpected extra arguments (2026/Software │
│ Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/rochacbruno@dundie-rewards__e35d6be5__htt │
│ px__aiohttp/integration/../tests/assets/people.csv) │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
 
" = <Result SystemExit(2)>.output

testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.integration
    @pytest.mark.medium
    def test_load_positive_call_load_command():
        """test command load"""
        out = cmd.invoke(load, PEOPLE_FILE)
>       assert "Dunder Mifflin Associates" in out.output
